meaning: Sold in its current condition, including any faults, without a warranty or possibility of return.
definition: Sold in its current condition, including any faults, without a warranty or possibility of return.
example: The damaged dining table was sold as-is for a very low price.
exampleHindi: क्षतिग्रस्त डाइनिंग टेबल को वैसे ही बहुत कम कीमत पर बेच दिया गया।

meaning: Something bought or offered for sale much cheaper than its usual price.
definition: Something bought or offered for sale much cheaper than its usual price.
example: At only ten dollars, this winter coat was a real bargain.
exampleHindi: केवल दस डॉलर में, यह शीतकालीन कोट एक वास्तविक सौदा था।

meaning: The highest amount of money a buyer is willing to pay, or the lowest a seller is willing to accept.
definition: The highest amount of money a buyer is willing to pay, or the lowest a seller is willing to accept.
example: The seller accepted my best offer of three hundred dollars for the antique desk.
exampleHindi: विक्रेता ने प्राचीन डेस्क के लिए तीन सौ डॉलर का मेरा सर्वोत्तम प्रस्ताव स्वीकार कर लिया।

meaning: A promotion where you get a second identical item for free if you buy one.
definition: A promotion where you get a second identical item for free if you buy one.
example: The supermarket has a buy one get one free offer on all fresh berries.
exampleHindi: सुपरमार्केट में सभी ताज़ी बेरीज पर एक खरीदो और एक मुफ़्त पाओ का ऑफर है।

meaning: A sale in which a shop sells off its old stock at low prices to make room for new items.
definition: A sale in which a shop sells off its old stock at low prices to make room for new items.
example: I bought this pair of boots for half price at the clearance sale.
exampleHindi: मैंने जूतों की यह जोड़ी क्लीयरेंस सेल में आधी कीमत पर खरीदी।

meaning: A piece of paper or a digital code that gives you a discount when buying a product.
definition: A piece of paper or a digital code that gives you a discount when buying a product.
example: She clipped coupons from the newspaper to save money on groceries.
exampleHindi: किराने के सामान पर पैसे बचाने के लिए उसने अखबार से कूपन काटे।

meaning: A reduction in the usual price of something.
definition: A reduction made from the gross amount or value of something.
example: Students receive a ten percent discount on all public transport tickets.
exampleHindi: छात्रों को सभी सार्वजनिक परिवहन टिकटों पर दस प्रतिशत की छूट मिलती है।

meaning: A discount of a fixed percentage or amount that applies to all items without exceptions.
definition: A discount of a fixed percentage or amount that applies to all items without exceptions.
example: The store is offering a flat thirty percent discount on everything today.
exampleHindi: स्टोर आज हर चीज़ पर तीस प्रतिशत की छूट दे रहा है।

meaning: Arguing or negotiating about the price of something before reaching an agreement.
definition: Arguing or negotiating about the price of something before reaching an agreement.
example: In local markets, haggling is expected and can save you a lot of money.
exampleHindi: स्थानीय बाज़ारों में, मोलभाव की अपेक्षा की जाती है और इससे आप बहुत सारा पैसा बचा सकते हैं।

meaning: Costing only fifty percent of the original price.
definition: Costing only fifty percent of the original price.
example: During the summer sale, all shirts were sold at half price.
exampleHindi: ग्रीष्मकालीन बिक्री के दौरान, सभी शर्टें आधी कीमत पर बेची गईं।

meaning: The standard, advertised price of an item before any discounts are applied.
definition: The standard, advertised price of an item before any discounts are applied.
example: We managed to buy the car for two thousand dollars below the list price.
exampleHindi: हम सूची मूल्य से दो हजार डॉलर कम में कार खरीदने में कामयाब रहे।

meaning: A scheme where a store rewards regular customers with discounts or free items.
definition: A marketing strategy designed to encourage customers to continue to shop at or use the services of a business associated with the program.
example: I used my points from the store's loyalty program to get a free coffee.
exampleHindi: मैंने मुफ़्त कॉफ़ी पाने के लिए स्टोर के लॉयल्टी कार्यक्रम से प्राप्त अपने अंकों का उपयोग किया।

meaning: A reduction in the price of goods to help sell them quickly.
definition: A reduction in the price of goods to help sell them quickly.
example: The store applied a major markdown to winter clothes in early spring.
exampleHindi: स्टोर ने शुरुआती वसंत में सर्दियों के कपड़ों पर भारी छूट लागू कर दी।

meaning: Formal discussion between people who are trying to reach an agreement, such as on a price.
definition: à¤¬à¤¾à¤¤à¤šà¥€à¤¤ / à¤®à¥‹à¤²à¤­à¤¾à¤µ
example: After some negotiation, the car dealer agreed to lower the price by five hundred dollars.
exampleHindi: कुछ बातचीत के बाद, कार डीलर कीमत पांच सौ डॉलर कम करने पर सहमत हो गया।

meaning: Costing more than the actual value or more than is reasonable.
definition: Costing more than the actual value or more than is reasonable.
example: The restaurant was nice, but the food was overpriced and not very tasty.
exampleHindi: रेस्तरां अच्छा था, लेकिन खाना बहुत महंगा था और बहुत स्वादिष्ट नहीं था।

meaning: A policy where a store agrees to sell an item for the same low price offered by a competitor.
definition: A policy where a store agrees to sell an item for the same low price offered by a competitor.
example: They offer a price match guarantee, so I showed them the cheaper price online.
exampleHindi: वे कीमत मिलान की गारंटी देते हैं, इसलिए मैंने उन्हें ऑनलाइन सस्ती कीमत दिखाई।

meaning: A short string of letters or numbers used online to get a discount on a purchase.
definition: A short string of letters or numbers used online to get a discount on a purchase.
example: Enter the promo code 'SAVE20' at checkout to get twenty percent off your order.
exampleHindi: अपने ऑर्डर पर बीस प्रतिशत की छूट पाने के लिए चेकआउट के समय प्रोमो कोड 'SAVE20' दर्ज करें।

meaning: An amount of money returned to a customer after they have paid the full price for a product.
definition: An amount of money returned to a customer after they have paid the full price for a product.
example: There is a fifty-dollar mail-in rebate available for this washing machine.
exampleHindi: इस वॉशिंग मशीन के लिए पचास डॉलर की मेल-इन छूट उपलब्ध है।

meaning: Something that is much more expensive than it should be; a cheat.
definition: Something that is much more expensive than it should be; a cheat.
example: Charging twenty dollars for a bottle of water at the concert is a total rip-off.
exampleHindi: कॉन्सर्ट में पानी की एक बोतल के लिए बीस डॉलर चार्ज करना पूरी तरह से धोखा है।

meaning: A sale held at the end of a season to sell off seasonal goods.
definition: A sale held at the end of a season to sell off seasonal goods.
example: I always buy my winter coats during the spring seasonal sale when prices drop.
exampleHindi: मैं अपने शीतकालीन कोट हमेशा वसंत मौसमी बिक्री के दौरान खरीदता हूं जब कीमतें गिरती हैं।

meaning: A temporary price reduction or bonus deal to encourage people to buy.
definition: A temporary price reduction or bonus deal to encourage people to buy.
example: Take advantage of our special offer: sign up today and get the first month free.
exampleHindi: हमारे विशेष ऑफर का लाभ उठाएं: आज ही साइन अप करें और पहला महीना मुफ़्त पाएं।

meaning: A bargain that is so good it feels like you are taking it for free.
definition: A bargain that is so good it feels like you are taking it for free.
example: At only five dollars for this brand new book, it was a complete steal.
exampleHindi: इस बिल्कुल नई किताब के लिए केवल पाँच डॉलर में, यह पूरी तरह से चोरी थी।

meaning: Costing less than the actual value or worth.
definition: Costing less than the actual value or worth.
example: The house was underpriced, so it sold within two days of listing.
exampleHindi: घर की कीमत कम थी, इसलिए यह लिस्टिंग के दो दिनों के भीतर ही बिक गया।

meaning: Something that is worth the amount of money you pay for it.
definition: Something that is worth the amount of money you pay for it.
example: This cheap smartphone works incredibly well and offers great value for money.
exampleHindi: यह सस्ता स्मार्टफोन अविश्वसनीय रूप से अच्छा काम करता है और पैसे के लिए बढ़िया मूल्य प्रदान करता है।

meaning: A document or code that can be exchanged for goods or services of a certain value.
definition: A document or code that can be exchanged for goods or services of a certain value.
example: The airline gave us a travel voucher as compensation for the delayed flight.
exampleHindi: एयरलाइन ने हमें विलंबित उड़ान के मुआवजे के रूप में एक यात्रा वाउचर दिया।
